## Codex Quota Monitor

Desktop app de theo doi quota Codex va quan ly nhieu tai khoan trong mot noi.

### Highlights

- Theo doi quota theo chu ky `5h` va `7d`
- Quan ly nhieu tai khoan Codex
- `Switch & Restart` cho VS Code, Codex extension, Antigravity va Codex app
- Chan switch khi phat hien `Codex CLI` standalone dang chay
- Ho tro OAuth, import tu `auth.json`, refresh usage, warm-up request
- Runtime log panel de theo doi thao tac switch, restart va update

### Data & Compatibility

- Backup/import voi dinh dang cua Codex Quota Monitor
- Ho tro migrate du lieu cu tu `~/.codex-switcher` sang `~/.codex-quota-monitor`
- Giu tuong thich voi backup legacy tu cac ban cu
